skos:definition.@value: Bitte, Bittgebet, Wunsch; jede Bitte, welche die Priester beim Opfer aussprechen, die ist zu Gunsten des Opferers
Act of bestowing a blessing upon others
One of the eight chief medicaments. a blessing, benediction, expression of a prayer or wish; ‘having poison in its fangs,’ a snake

<L>7037<pc>0264-a<k1>ASis<k2>ASis
{#ASis#}¦ {%<ab>f.</ab>%} ({#˚SIH, ˚SIrByAM#} &c.) [ <lbinfo n="A#SAs"/>
{#ASAs-kvip, ata itvam#}] {@1@} A blessing, <lbinfo n="bene+diction"/>
benediction. (It is thus defined:
--{#vAtsalyAdyatra mAnyena kanizWasyABiDIyate .#} <lbinfo n="izwA#vaDArakaM"/>
{#izwAvaDArakaM vAkyamASIH sA parikItiMtA ..#}). {#ASis#}
is sometimes distinguished from {#vara#},
the former being taken to be merely
an expression of one's good wishes
which may or may not be realized;
while a {#vara#} is a boon which is more
permanent in character and surer of
fulfilment; <ab>cf.</ab> {#varaH KalvezanASIH#} <ls>Ś. 4</ls>;
{#ASizo gurujanavitIrRA varatAmApadyaMte#}  <lbinfo n="ls:K.+ 291"/>
<ls>K. 291</ls>; {#amoGAH pratigfhRaMtAvarGyAnupadamASizaH#}
<ls>R. 1. 44</ls>, <ls n="R.">11. 6</ls>; <ls>Ku. 5. 76</ls>, <ls n="Ku.">7. 47.</ls>
{@--2@} Act of bestowing a blessing <lbinfo n="up+on"/>
upon others. {@--3@} A prayer, wish, desire;
<ls>Ku. 5. 76</ls>, <ls>Bg. 4. 21</ls>, <ls n="Bg.">6. 10.</ls> {@--4@} A
serpent's fang (<ab>cf.</ab> {#ASI#}). {@--5@} One of
the eight chief medicaments ({#vfdDi#}).
{@--Comp.@} {#--vAdaH, --vacanaM#} ( <lbinfo n="ASI#rvAdaH"/>
{#ASIrvAdaH#} &c.) a blessing, benediction,
expression of a prayer or wish;
{#ASIrvacanasaMyuktAM nityaM yasmAt prakurvate#}
<ls>S. D. 6</ls>; <ls>Ms. 2. 33.</ls> {#--vizaH#} ({#ASIrvizaH#})
‘having poison in its fangs,’ a snake.
<LEND>
